title: neorautanenia pseudopachyrrhiza
intro: Neorautanenia pseudopachyrrhiza is a plant species commonly known as "Mantang". It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its diverse health benefits. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. Neorautanenia pseudopachyrrhiza is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
